'''Benwick Chell''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Hapan]] and [[Vonce]]'s co-pilot. A soldier of the [[Hapan Royal Navy]] at the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], he was a dissenter who disliked [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka's]] involvement in the war. He therefore joined the [[Peace Brigade]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]'' {{1st}}
